name: Medieval Fantasy RP (Personal Rework)
description:
A rework of :@Mayu0910 Medieval Fantasy World RP Bot.

I am creating this bot with the aim of creating a more ‘peaceful’ environment for the fantasy world. In an attempt to ensure that you can be anything from a fisherman to the creator of the universe. Leave suggestions, problems, and opinions in the comments :)

(Proxy recommended)
creator: GabPont
